description_en: The Tsukayama tumulus is a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is town-designated by Yachiyo Town and was designated on 1978-04-01. It is located in Fukita.
The Waka tumulus is a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is town-designated by Yachiyo Town and was designated on 1986-03-28. It is located in Waka.
The Nieido tumulus No. 5 is a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. It is town-designated by Yachiyo Town and was designated on 2022-12-22. It is located in Nieido.

name_en: Precincts and Wooded Grounds of Kashima Shrine
description_en: The precincts and surrounding wooded grounds of Kashima Shrine form a Historic Site in the Monuments category of Japanese cultural properties. They are town-designated by Yachiyo Town and were designated on 1994-01-24. They are located in Nozume.

name_en: Ironmaking Furnace Site at the Ozaki Maeyama Ruins

The Suteki-bayashi is a form of festival music classified as an Intangible Folk Cultural Property. It is municipally designated by Tsukuba City and was designated on 1976-11-01. It is located in Suteki.

name_en: Stone Tablet with the Seed-Syllable of Bishamonten

name_en: Kanamura Wakeikazuchi Shrine (Worship Hall, Kagura Hall, and Corridor)

name_en: Zuiganin Temple (Main Hall, Mountain Gate, and Bell Tower)
